narrative:
Westerville 1-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 792 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
